zh.Husum, Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein: 德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 諾爾德福利曼德素姆
zh.September 26 1544, in Nieuport, Flandre: 比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫尼普爾特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Henriette de Halewyn於1544年9月26日出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫尼普爾特時，她的父親Jan de Halewyn34歲，母親Jossine De Lannoy25歲。她於1558年5月1日與Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1581年12月6日在法國諾爾德波格斯享年37歲，埋葬在比利時海瑙特波蒙特。

zh-hans.Husum, Nordfriesland, Schleswig-Holstein: 德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 諾爾德福利曼德素姆
zh-hans.September 26 1544, in Nieuport, Flandre: 比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫尼普爾特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Henriette de Halewyn于1544年9月26日出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫尼普爾特时，她的父亲Jan de Halewyn34岁，母亲Jossine De Lannoy25岁。她于1558年5月1日与Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1581年12月6日在法国諾爾德波格斯享年37岁，埋葬在比利时海瑙特波蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Henriette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine diminutive of Henri, the French form of Henry , now in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Henriette de Halewyn was born on 26 September 1544, in Nieuwpoort, West Flanders, Belgium, her father, Jan de Halewyn, was 34 and her mother, Jossine De Lannoy, was 25. She married Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen on 1 May 1558. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 6 December 1581, in Bergues, Nord, France, at the age of 37, and was buried in Beaumont, Hainaut, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Henriette de Halewyn est née le 26 septembre 1544, à Nieuwpoort, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Jan de Halewyn, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jossine De Lannoy, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen le 1 mai 1558. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1581, à Bergues, Nord, France, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Beaumont, Hainaut, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Henriette de Halewyn am 26. September 1544 in Nieuwpoort, West-Flandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan de Halewyn 34 und ihre Mutter Jossine De Lannoy 25. Sie hat am 1. Mai 1558 Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Dezember 1581 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Bergues, Nord, Frankreich und wurde in Beaumont, Hennegau, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Henriette de Halewyn è nata il il 26 settembre 1544 nel Nieuwpoort, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, sua padre, Jan de Halewyn, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Jossine De Lannoy, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen il 1 maggio 1558. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 dicembre 1581, nel Bergues, Nord, Francia, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Beaumont, Hainaut, Belgio.

ja.September 26 1544, in Nieuport, Flandre: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンニーウウプオオルト
ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Henriette de Halewynが1544年9月26日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンニーウウプオオルトで生まれた時，父Jan de Halewynは34歳，母Jossine De Lannoyは25歳であった。1558年5月1日にPhillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年12月6日にフランスノードバーグスで37歳で死去し，ベルギーヘイナトビーウモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Henriette de Halewyn(이)가 1544년 9월 26일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 니우w포어트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan de Halewyn(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jossine De Lannoy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1558년 5월 1일 Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 12월 6일 프랑스 노르드 버구스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 하인오트 보몽에 묻혔다.

mn.26 September 1544–6 December 1581: 1544 оны Есдүгээр сарын 26–1581 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 6

pt.26 September 1544–6 December 1581: 26 de setembro de 1544–6 de dezembro de 1581
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Henriette de Halewyn nasceu em 26 de setembro de 1544, em Nieuwpoort, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Jan de Halewyn, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jossine De Lannoy, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen em 1 de maio de 1558. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1581, em Bergues, Nord, França, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Beaumont, Hainaut, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Henriette de Halewyn родилась 26 сентября 1544 г. в местности ниеувпурт, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Jan de Halewyn было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jossine De Lannoy, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen 1 мая 1558 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 декабря 1581 г. в местности биргуесь, норд, Франция в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности бомонт, ханаут, Бельгия.

es.26 September 1544–6 December 1581: 26 de septiembre de 1544–6 de diciembre de 1581
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Henriette de Halewyn nació el 26 de septiembre de 1544, en Nieuwpoort, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, su papá, Jan de Halewyn, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jossine De Lannoy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen el 1 de mayo de 1558. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1581, en Bergues, Nord, Francia, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Beaumont, Hainaut, Bélgica.
